otp_verification.subject: Your Persona's - Verification Code
otp_verification.body:
Hello,

Your verification code is: %s

It is valid for 15 minutes. Please do not share this code with anyone.

Best regards,
Your Persona Team

otp_reset.subject: Your Persona's - Password Reset Request
otp_reset.body:
Hello,

Your password reset verification code is: %s

It is valid for 15 minutes. Please do not share this code with anyone.

Best regards,
Your Persona Team

deletion_confirmed.subject: Your Persona's - Data Deletion Completed
deletion_confirmed.body:
Hello,

As you requested, your personal data (email, name, essay answers, and AI summary) has been permanently deleted/anonymized from our systems. Your account can no longer be used to log in.

Thank you for using Your Persona's.

Best regards,
Your Persona Team
